st.orm.repository.Repository

Description
st.orm.repository
 

  • Uses of Repository in st.orm.repository

    Subinterfaces of Repository in st.orm.repository
    Modifier and Type
    Interface
    Description
    interface 
    EntityRepository<E extends Entity<ID>,ID>
    Provides a generic interface with CRUD operations for entities.
    interface 
    ProjectionRepository<P extends Projection<ID>,ID>
    Provides a generic interface with read operations for projections.
    Methods in st.orm.repository with type parameters of type Repository
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    <R extends Repository>
    R
    RepositoryLookup.repository(Class<R> type)
    Returns a proxy for the repository of the given type.
